title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Nami, Sanji, Big Mom, Luffy, Jinbe, Vinsmoke Family as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: whole cake inside the chateau infirmary

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What tough skin, and what marvelous healing ability...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A dark plan festers in the night that falls upon the chateau...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So these are the modified humans of the germa, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as she rests properly, she should easily

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: be able to attend tomorrow's tea party.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let the Vinsmoke family know that we'll be keeping her here for a night.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, we must check the infirmary on the 4th floor as well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was walking around the castle, when... I ran into some soldiers that were screaming about an "invader"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I got caught up in all of that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You won't be able to remember it properly. Your memories have been overwritten.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get the feeling... we've been through something like this before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry about that. The only way I could get you all out of there was to burn Mont D'Or's books.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shishishi! Guess I didn't have to rip off my arms after all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come to think of it, we first met in a prison, didn't we, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look! There were so many other prisoners besides just you two in those books!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His world of books ability is as infinite as his imagination!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Big mom has many capable underlings.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
